Dear Mr. Ward:
Enclosed herewith are two forms of order sustaining our demurrer and granting our
motion to strike. Please sign each form on page two and mail them back to our office within five
days so that we can submit them to Judge Quidachay for signature. Thank you for your
cooperation.
Very truly yours,

Judge of the Superior Court
San Francisco Superior Court
400 McAllister Street
San Francisco, CA 94102-4512
Re: Ward v. University of CA. Hastings College of the Law
San Francisco Superior Court - Unlimited No.: 415692
Dear Judge Quidachay:
On May 6, 2003, you made your order sustaining our demurrer and motion to strike in the
above matter, with leave to amend, and we sent proposed orders to plaintiff in pro per for
approval on the same date. Enclosed is a copy of our letter. We have not received any response
for Mr. Ward so we are now submitting each order to you for signature.
We are enclosing an original and a copy of the Order Sustaining Demurrer to Complaint
and of the Order Granting Motion to Strike Punitive Damages Allegations of Complaint in the
above-captioned matter for your signature. Please ask your clerk to file the original of each
order and anreturn a conformed copy of each order to our office using the enclosed self-
addressed stamped envelope.
Thank you for your assistance.
Very truly yours,
. j,
La
/ Jobn J. Murzay
